title: deutzia × magnifica f. latiflora
intro: Deutzia × magnifica f. latiflora, also known as the flowering shrub, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Hydrangeaceae family. It is often used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its flowers and leaves. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Deutzia × magnifica f. latiflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
